requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation (EPR / battery passport / recycled content)
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规（EPR/电池护照/再生材料含量）
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規（EPR/電池護照/再生材料含量）

summary.en: Mozambique does not run an EU-style horizontal battery regime equivalent to EU Regulation 2023/1542. There is no publicly visible Mozambique battery passport system, no nationwide imported-battery recycled-content mandate, and no national battery carbon-footprint declaration precondition for market entry. Mozambique applies INNOQ-conformity pathways based on National Standards (NM) and regulates import entry through conformity and import inspection for products placed in scope by INNOQ, with enforcement tied to import controls and general environmental programmes rather than a stand-alone battery lifecycle law.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克并未运行与EU Regulation 2023/1542对标的欧盟式横向电池制度。莫桑比克没有公开可见的电池护照体系、没有全国范围的进口锂电池再生材料强制含量门槛，也没有以电池法规为前置条件的碳足迹声明。莫桑比克依据INNOQ的国家标准（NM）和进口受控产品的合格评定与进口检验进行规制，执行依赖入境合规流程与一般环境计划，而非单一电池生命周期法律。
summary.zht: 莫桑比克並未運行與EU Regulation 2023/1542對標的歐盟式橫向電池制度。莫桑比克沒有公開可見的電池護照體系、沒有全國範圍的進口鋰電池再生材料強制含量門檻，也沒有以電池法規為前置條件的碳足跡聲明。莫桑比克依據INNOQ的國家標準（NM）及受控產品的合格評定與進口檢驗進行規制，執行依賴入境合規流程與一般環境計畫，而非單一電池生命週期法。

standards_or_laws: INNOQ standards framework — National Standards (NM) based on international/electrotechnical standards
INNOQ conformity and import inspection controls for regulated products
Mozambique import control rules and general waste/environment programme obligations

summary.en: China relies on GB/GB-T technical baselines and CCC for relevant finished products in a product-category framework, rather than one national horizontal battery lifecycle regime. For export, the China baseline is relevant only as domestic evidence and is not a battery passport recognised by Mozambique. Chinese documentation can support safety and technical consistency, but Mozambique still requires local conformity path confirmation through INNOQ for in-scope regulated products.
summary.zh: 中国主要依据GB/GB-T技术基础与相关成品CCC制度进行类别式管理，而非单一欧盟式横向电池全生命周期制度。对外出口而言，中国基线更多是国内证据，不能作为莫桑比克认可的电池护照。中国文件可支持安全与技术一致性，但莫桑比克仍要求对受监管产品按INNOQ规定确认本地合规路径。
summary.zht: 中國主要依據GB/GB-T技術基礎與相關成品CCC制度進行類別式管理，而非單一歐盟式橫向電池全生命週期制度。對外出口而言，中國基線更多是國內證據，不能作為莫桑比克認可的電池護照。中國文件可支援安全與技術一致性，但莫桑比克仍要求對受監管產品按INNOQ規定確認本地合規路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/GB-T lithium battery safety and EMC standards where applicable
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where the finished electronic product is in scope

gap.en: The practical gap is absence of a matching horizontal battery regime in Mozambique. Exporters should focus on identifying whether the specific lithium battery or power bank is in scope for INNOQ import-conformity control, then align evidence with INNOQ inspection requirements. Keep in mind that Chinese GB or CCC packages do not substitute for Mozambique-specific import conformity or any local market access process. Chinese 50 Hz electrical systems align on frequency, but this does not change this regulatory structure.
gap.zh: 实务差距在于莫桑比克没有对应的横向电池制度。出口商应先确认具体锂电池或移动电源是否属于INNOQ的进口合格评定范围，再按其检验要求准备证据。需注意中国GB或CCC文件不能替代莫桑比克本地市场准入流程。中国与莫桑比克同为50 Hz并不改变合规路径本身。
gap.zht: 實務差距在於莫桑比克沒有對應的橫向電池制度。出口商應先確認具體鋰電池或行動電源是否屬於INNOQ的進口合格評定範圍，再按其檢驗要求準備證據。需注意中國GB或CCC文件不能替代莫桑比克本地市場准入流程。中國與莫桑比克同為50 Hz並不改變合規路徑本身。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style horizontal battery regime in Mozambique; market access depends on INNOQ conformity and import inspection for regulated in-scope products
mandatory_status.cn: No Mozambique-style horizontal battery passport regime; China applies GB/GB-T and CCC product-category conformity only

source.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (INNOQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique does not have an EU-style horizontal battery law with passport, EPR registration, or recycled-content preconditions. Compliance focus is on INNOQ scope-based conformity and import inspection for regulated products. Chinese GB/CCC evidence is not by itself a Mozambique market-entry substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克没有欧盟式横向电池制度及电池护照、EPR注册或再生材料占比前置条件。合规核心是INNOQ按适用范围的合格评定和进口检验。中国GB或CCC证据本身不能代替莫桑比克市场准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫桑比克沒有歐盟式橫向電池制度及電池護照、EPR登記或再生材料佔比前置條件。合規核心是INNOQ按適用範圍的合格評定和進口檢驗。中國GB或CCC證據本身不能代替莫桑比克市場准入。
